name: product_id
description: Canonical product id derived from product_id / viewing_product_id during Project 05 crawling.

name: product_name
description: Title scraped from the product page (og:title → <title> → <h1> fallback). NULL when crawl was blocked.

name: source_url
description: URL crawled to obtain the product name.

name: status
description: HTTP status code from the crawl (200 OK, 403/429/503 blocked, 0 = transport error).

name: error
description: Free-text reason when the crawl failed (e.g. blocked_429_wait_3.0s).
